From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>

Date: 2024-03-08 10:46 EST

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our CIO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---

To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-02-19 09:06 EST
Subject: Follow-up: forecast prep Review

Just checking in on the forecast prep proposal. Our CIO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-02 11:48 EST
Subject: URGENT: forecast prep Issue at Blue Yonder Airlines

There's been a change in our timeline for forecast prep. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: forecast prep Discussion - Blue Yonder Airlines
Date: 2024-02-17
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines), David Chen (Microsoft)

[00:01:15] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is forecast prep.

[00:06:00] David Chen (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:10:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:12:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is cost optimization.

[00:16:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:21:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for technical validation is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:24:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:27:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:32:00] David Chen (Microsoft): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
